Here is a structure diagram for the part definition "Camera" showing its parts and performed actions based on the current model context:

This diagram shows "Camera" as the root part definition with sub-parts "focusingSubsystem" and "imagingSubsystem". The "takePicture" action is performed by the Camera, and its sub-actions "focus" and "shoot" are performed by the respective subsystems.
